title: polycarena subtilis
intro: Polycarena subtilis is a species of flowering plant in the family Scrophulariaceae, native to the Western Cape province of South Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Polycarena subtilis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, Polycarena subtilis is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
